[@global-torque/admin-toolkit](./admin-toolkit.md)


</td><td>

JavaScript URL facade for the optional reference stylesheet.

CSS-aware tools resolve the `style` or `default` export condition directly to `styles.css`<!-- -->; JavaScript and TypeScript consumers receive this stable URL.


</td></tr>
